scripts.build: bun run build:helper && bun run build:triggers && bun run build:plugin
scripts.build:helper: dotnet publish helper -c Release && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/copy-publish-exe.ps1 -Source helper/bin/Release/net8.0-windows10.0.22621.0/win-x64/publish/QuickbitsHelper.exe -Dest dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/helper/QuickbitsHelper.exe
scripts.build:triggers: dotnet publish triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenSync -c Release && dotnet publish triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenStatic -c Release && dotnet publish triggers/SkydimoTrigger.LightingOff -c Release && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/copy-publish-exe.ps1 -Source triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenSync/bin/Release/net8.0-windows10.0.22621.0/win-x64/publish/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenSync.exe -Dest dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/triggers/skydimo-screen-sync/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenSync.exe && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/copy-publish-exe.ps1 -Source triggers/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenStatic/bin/Release/net8.0-windows10.0.22621.0/win-x64/publish/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenStatic.exe -Dest dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/triggers/skydimo-screen-static/SkydimoTrigger.ScreenStatic.exe && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/copy-publish-exe.ps1 -Source triggers/SkydimoTrigger.LightingOff/bin/Release/net8.0-windows10.0.22621.0/win-x64/publish/SkydimoTrigger.LightingOff.exe -Dest dev.aryapaw.quickbits.sdPlugin/triggers/skydimo-lighting-off/SkydimoTrigger.LightingOff.exe
